Appearances:
Plaintiff Jin Feng Wong is present.

Defendant Rasaura Ramirez is present.
Attorney Tyler Rougeau representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.
